message:
feat(wiki): ingest reward-shaping supersession cluster (proof-first)

Proof-first validation of the in-repo wiki: hand-ingested the reward-shaping
archaeology cut from CLAUDE.md. 8 notes (3 supersession chains + raw/shaped anchor
+ synthesis hub), 14 claims grounded in real source quotes (plans/ + CLAUDE.md),
3 decision dialog entries, 1 cross-source-verified claim.

Chains: equal-exposure -> equal-profit sizing (f7a09fc); CLOSE_SIGNAL_BONUS
1.0 -> 0.5 -> 0 (f193e41, 5d57a91); aggregate -> per-pair naked penalty.

Demonstrated working: query unverified-claims (13), query supersedes (3),
view supersession-timeline, view dialog-trail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
